TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_Haciang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau a kaput sikaput tu wasu.
S.PHON: jau a kaput sikaput tu wasu.
S.FORM: yau a kaput sikaput tu wasu.
S.PHON: jau a kaput sikaput tu wasu.

S.FORM: yau a qenuduna tu biyat qaya.
S.PHON: jau a qənuɮuna tu βijat qaja.
S.FORM: yau a qenuduna tu biyat qaya.
S.PHON: jau a qənuɮuna tu βijat qaja.

S.FORM: sasazay sayza biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sasaz~raj sajz~ra βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: sasazay sayza biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: sasaz~raj sajz~ra βijat a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙可能一直在唱歌.

S.FORM: tmayta ta biyat a yau wasu 'nay yau.
S.PHON: tmajta ta βijat a jau wasu ʔnaj jau.
S.FORM: tmayta ta biyat a yau wasu 'nay yau.
S.PHON: tmajta ta βijat a jau wasu ʔnaj jau.
S.TRANSL: That dog looked at the frog.

S.FORM: timeng a tuRusti sayza sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: timəŋ a tuʁusti sajz~ra sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: timeng a tuRusti sayza sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: timəŋ a tuʁusti sajz~ra sunis a jau nani.

S.FORM: maynapti qaya sunis a zau zinna nani.
S.PHON: majnapti qaja sunis a z~rau z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: maynapti qaya sunis a zau zinna nani.
S.PHON: majnapti qaja sunis a z~rau z~rinna nani.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) thought this child fell asleep too.

S.TRANSL: thought this child fell asleep too.

S.FORM: wiyati mRaRiw yau biyat a yau melisitti nani.
S.PHON: wijati mʁaʁiw jau βijat a jau mərisitti nani.
S.FORM: wiyati mRaRiw yau biyat a yau melisitti nani.
S.PHON: wijati mʁaʁiw jau βijat a jau mərisitti nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙從某個地方偷跑出去.

S.FORM: o titaannati na wasu yau sayza.
o titaannati na wasu yau sayza.

TRANSL.notes: 可能被那隻狗看到(青蛙不見)了.

S.TRANSL: 可能被那隻狗看到 了.

TRANSL.notes: Probably the dog saw (the frog was gone).

S.FORM: inainaRanati lazatna ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: inainaʁanati raz~ratna ja sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: inainaRanati lazatna ya sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: inainaʁanati raz~ratna ja sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 一直叫他的主人,那個小孩子起床.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog) kept awaking his master, that child.

S.TRANSL: kept awaking his master, that child.

S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau tu.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau tu.
S.FORM: maiti ya biyat a yau tu.
S.PHON: maiti ja βijat a jau tu.

S.FORM: yauti mkikilim Ray wasu yau tu.
S.PHON: jauti mkikirim ʁaj wasu jau tu.
S.FORM: yauti mkikilim Ray wasu yau tu.
S.PHON: jauti mkikirim ʁaj wasu jau tu.
S.TRANSL: Even the dog kept looking for it too.

S.FORM: qadanna qadanna suzizitangti a izaanna u.
S.PHON: qaɮanna qaɮanna suz~riz~ritaŋti a iz~raanna u.
S.FORM: qadanna qadanna suzizitangti a izaanna u.
S.PHON: qaɮanna qaɮanna suz~riz~ritaŋti a iz~raanna u.
S.TRANSL: 他把他們的椅子都弄倒了.

W.TRANSL: 東翻西找-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.TRANSL: 全部的家具和衣服都沒有.
All the things and clothes. The frog was not there.

S.FORM: tenga qemqemRas ta izayau ta biyat a yau.
S.PHON: təŋa qəmqəmʁas ta iz~rajau ta βijat a jau.
S.FORM: tenga qemqemRas ta izayau ta biyat a yau.
S.PHON: təŋa qəmqəmʁas ta iz~rajau ta βijat a jau.

S.FORM: Ray wawasu a yau mRaytutumuz nani.
S.PHON: ʁaj wawasu a jau mʁajtutumuz~r nani.
S.FORM: Ray wawasu a yau mRaytutumuz nani.
S.PHON: ʁaj wawasu a jau mʁajtutumuz~r nani.

S.FORM: tu mlilizaqti a wasu aya ya lazat natu wasu a yau simpapakRunan.
S.PHON: tu mririz~raqti a wasu aja ja raz~rat natu wasu a jau simpapakʁunan.
S.FORM: tu mlilizaqti a wasu aya ya lazat natu wasu a yau simpapakRunan.
S.PHON: tu mririz~raqti a wasu aja ja raz~rat natu wasu a jau simpapakʁunan.
S.TRANSL: 人和狗都很快樂互相擁抱.
The dog and the person were very happy and hugged each other.

S.FORM: titaanna nani yauti ta paRpaRinan a iza zau.
S.PHON: titaanna nani jauti ta paʁpaʁinan a iz~ra z~rau.
S.FORM: titaanna nani yauti ta paRpaRinan a iza zau.
S.PHON: titaanna nani jauti ta paʁpaʁinan a iz~ra z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到那裡有一個樹林.
They saw there were woods out there.

S.FORM: iza matiw sa izau sa naung.
S.PHON: iz~ra matiw sa iz~rau sa nauŋ.
S.FORM: iza matiw sa izau sa naung.
S.PHON: iz~ra matiw sa iz~rau sa nauŋ.

S.FORM: tmayta tu iza ta biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: tmajta tu iz~ra ta βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: tmayta tu iza ta biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: tmajta tu iz~ra ta βijat a jau nani.

S.FORM: yau ta izaan u yau a penay.
S.PHON: jau ta iz~raan u jau a pənaj.
S.FORM: yau ta izaan u yau a penay.
S.PHON: jau ta iz~raan u jau a pənaj.

S.FORM: e izau qatiwannati na wasu yau mRaytututumuz nani.
S.PHON: ə iz~rau qatiwannati na wasu jau mʁajtututumuz~r nani.
S.FORM: e izau qatiwannati na wasu yau mRaytututumuz nani.
S.PHON: ə iz~rau qatiwannati na wasu jau mʁajtututumuz~r nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗也跟著過去一直不停地叫.
The dog went and kept barking.

S.FORM: tu tutuzanna ya paRin a yau.
S.PHON: tu tutuz~ranna ja paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: tu tutuzanna ya paRin a yau.
S.PHON: tu tutuz~ranna ja paʁin a jau.

S.FORM: tmibuqti ya izau penay a yau lepawna na.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ja iz~rau pənaj a jau rəpawna na.
S.FORM: tmibuqti ya izau penay a yau lepawna na.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti ja iz~rau pənaj a jau rəpawna na.

S.FORM: nani kaRu sunis a zau na taytaanna ya paRin nani.
S.PHON: nani kaʁu sunis a z~rau na tajtaanna ja paʁin nani.
S.FORM: nani kaRu sunis a zau na taytaanna ya paRin nani.
S.PHON: nani kaʁu sunis a z~rau na tajtaanna ja paʁin nani.

S.FORM: e tangan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: ə taŋan na paʁin a jau.
S.FORM: e tangan na paRin a yau.
S.PHON: ə taŋan na paʁin a jau.

S.FORM: qatiwanna mzaqis na sunis a yau a paRin a yau nani.
S.PHON: qatiwanna mz~raqis na sunis a jau a paʁin a jau nani.
S.FORM: qatiwanna mzaqis na sunis a yau a paRin a yau nani.
S.PHON: qatiwanna mz~raqis na sunis a jau a paʁin a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩過去爬上那棵樹.
That child went there and climbed up the tree.
It turned out to be a bird.

S.FORM: ku zinta ya a ya a izau adam nayau.
S.PHON: ku z~rinta ja a ja a iz~rau aɮam najau.
S.FORM: ku zinta ya a ya a izau adam nayau.
S.PHON: ku z~rinta ja a ja a iz~rau aɮam najau.

TRANSL.notes: (We) call that kind of bird owl.

S.TRANSL: call that kind of bird owl.

S.FORM: kaRu iza wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: kaʁu iz~ra wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: kaRu iza wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: kaʁu iz~ra wasu a jau nani.

S.FORM: izaannati na na penay tmantantanuz nani.
S.PHON: iz~raannati na na pənaj tmantantanuz~r nani.
S.FORM: izaannati na na penay tmantantanuz nani.
S.PHON: iz~raannati na na pənaj tmantantanuz~r nani.
S.TRANSL: 被那些蜜蜂一直追來追去.

TRANSL.notes: (It) was chased by the bees all around.

S.TRANSL: was chased by the bees all around.

S.FORM: yau a buRang zaqispaita tayan zinna ya.
S.PHON: jau a βuʁaŋ z~raqispaita tajan z~rinna ja.
S.FORM: yau a buRang zaqispaita tayan zinna ya.
S.PHON: jau a βuʁaŋ z~raqispaita tajan z~rinna ja.
S.TRANSL: 有石頭,他想:我們爬到那裡.
There was a rock. 'We will climb up there,'thought the child.

S.FORM: tenuzanna na ku a yau nani.
S.PHON: tənuz~ranna na ku a jau nani.
S.FORM: tenuzanna na ku a yau nani.
S.PHON: tənuz~ranna na ku a jau nani.

S.FORM: paRin sayza zinna ta wakina na.
S.PHON: paʁin sajz~ra z~rinna ta wakina na.
S.FORM: paRin sayza zinna ta wakina na.
S.PHON: paʁin sajz~ra z~rinna ta wakina na.
S.TRANSL: He thought the antlers were a wood.

S.FORM: imetanna na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: imətanna na sunis a jau nani.
S.FORM: imetanna na sunis a yau nani.
S.PHON: imətanna na sunis a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: The child took hold of it.

S.FORM: muRetutti sayza ya iza ya siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: muʁətutti sajz~ra ja iz~ra ja siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: muRetutti sayza ya iza ya siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: muʁətutti sajz~ra ja iz~ra ja siʁmuq a jau.

S.FORM: azasannati ya sunis a yau miza u m mRaRiw nani.
S.PHON: az~rasannati ja sunis a jau miz~ra u m mʁaʁiw nani.
S.FORM: azasannati ya sunis a yau miza u m mRaRiw nani.
S.PHON: az~rasannati ja sunis a jau miz~ra u m mʁaʁiw nani.
S.TRANSL: It took the child and ran far away.

S.FORM: baksiwanna na na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: βaksiwanna na na siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: baksiwanna na na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: βaksiwanna na na siʁmuq a jau.

S.FORM: qunipaimu mautu syazi ta zian tadamuanku zinna sayza na siRmuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: qunipaimu mautu sjaz~ri ta z~rian taɮamuanku z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁmuq a jau nani.
S.FORM: qunipaimu mautu syazi ta zian tadamuanku zinna sayza na siRmuq a yau nani.
S.PHON: qunipaimu mautu sjaz~ri ta z~rian taɮamuanku z~rinna sajz~ra na siʁmuq a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 你們幹麻來到我的管區那隻鹿可能說.
'Why do you come to my place?'that deer probably said.

TRANSL.notes: (The deer) threw (the child and the dog) into the river.

S.FORM: tmibuqti sunis a yau Ray izau wasu sayza.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti sunis a jau ʁaj iz~rau wasu sajz~ra.
S.FORM: tmibuqti sunis a yau Ray izau wasu sayza.
S.PHON: tmiβuqti sunis a jau ʁaj iz~rau wasu sajz~ra.
S.TRANSL: The child and the dog fell downwards.

S.FORM: 'nay kaputna tu biyat a yau a izaanna tmibuqti ta qiqidisan.
S.PHON: ʔnaj kaputna tu βijat a jau a iz~raanna tmiβuqti ta qiqiɮisan.
S.FORM: 'nay kaputna tu biyat a yau a izaanna tmibuqti ta qiqidisan.
S.PHON: ʔnaj kaputna tu βijat a jau a iz~raanna tmiβuqti ta qiqiɮisan.

S.FORM: miRuqti nani taytaannati na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: miʁuqti nani tajtaannati na siʁmuq a jau.
S.FORM: miRuqti nani taytaannati na siRmuq a yau.
S.PHON: miʁuqti nani tajtaannati na siʁmuq a jau.

S.FORM: papapaannati ya ya izau ya lazatna nani.
S.PHON: papapaannati ja ja iz~rau ja raz~ratna nani.
S.FORM: papapaannati ya ya izau ya lazatna nani.
S.PHON: papapaannati ja ja iz~rau ja raz~ratna nani.
S.TRANSL: Its owner carried it on the back.

S.FORM: timgeng u syazi tayzan sayza nani.
S.PHON: timgəŋ u sjaz~ri tajz~ran sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: timgeng u syazi tayzan sayza nani.
S.PHON: timgəŋ u sjaz~ri tajz~ran sajz~ra nani.

S.TRANSL: It turned out that there was his frog.

S.FORM: wiyati sia lubuna qatiwannati na sunis a yau Ray wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati sia ruβuna qatiwannati na sunis a jau ʁaj wasu a jau nani.
S.FORM: wiyati sia lubuna qatiwannati na sunis a yau Ray wasu a yau nani.
S.PHON: wijati sia ruβuna qatiwannati na sunis a jau ʁaj wasu a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和那隻狗進到窩裡.
The child and the dog went into the den.

S.FORM: titaanna nani yauti ya mazmun kinawsati a.
S.PHON: titaanna nani jauti ja maz~rmun kinawsati a.
S.FORM: titaanna nani yauti ya mazmun kinawsati a.
S.PHON: titaanna nani jauti ja maz~rmun kinawsati a.

S.FORM: iza sikaputti ya ka ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: iz~ra sikaputti ja ka ja βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: iza sikaputti ya ka ya biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: iz~ra sikaputti ja ka ja βijat a jau nani.

S.FORM: timeng a mazmunti a biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: timəŋ a maz~rmunti a βijat a jau nani.
S.FORM: timeng a mazmunti a biyat a yau nani.
S.PHON: timəŋ a maz~rmunti a βijat a jau nani.

TRANSL.notes: 可能所有的(青蛙)都在唱歌.

S.TRANSL: 可能所有的 都在唱歌.

S.FORM: timu izati sayza nani qawiyatiimi tmanan zinna tu.
S.PHON: timu iz~rati sajz~ra nani qawijatiimi tmanan z~rinna tu.
S.FORM: timu izati sayza nani qawiyatiimi tmanan zinna tu.
S.PHON: timu iz~rati sajz~ra nani qawijatiimi tmanan z~rinna tu.

S.FORM: sanuannati ya zau a zumaay biyat qawiyatiimi haw.
S.PHON: sanuannati ja z~rau a z~rumaaj βijat qawijatiimi haw.
S.FORM: sanuannati ya zau a zumaay biyat qawiyatiimi haw.
S.PHON: sanuannati ja z~rau a z~rumaaj βijat qawijatiimi haw.
S.TRANSL: 告訴別的青蛙,我們要回家了.
He told other frogs,'We are going home.'

S.FORM: azu qumni wanay si qawman qawtu ni uman.
S.PHON: az~ru qumni wanaj si qawman qawtu ni uman.
S.FORM: azu qumni wanay si qawman qawtu ni uman.
S.PHON: az~ru qumni wanaj si qawman qawtu ni uman.

S.FORM: yauti wanay zinna na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti wanaj z~rinna na sunis a jau.
S.FORM: yauti wanay zinna na sunis a yau.
S.PHON: jauti wanaj z~rinna na sunis a jau.
